name: download-everything
description: A gentle, one-click personal web downloader for public media links.

scripts.setup: npm run setup:engine && npm run setup:xhs
scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check scripts/setup-ytdlp.mjs && node --check scripts/setup-xhs.mjs && node --check lib/core/artifact-store.mjs && node --check lib/download/url.mjs && node --check lib/download/providers/index.mjs && node --check lib/download/providers/xhs-provider.mjs && node --check lib/download/providers/ytdlp-provider.mjs && node --check lib/media/audio-extractor.mjs && node --check lib/transcription/transcript-schema.mjs && node --check lib/transcription/exporters.mjs && node --check lib/transcription/providers/index.mjs && node --check lib/transcription/providers/fake-provider.mjs && node --check lib/transcription/providers/xunfei-lfasr-provider.mjs && node --check lib/transcription/providers/xunfei-ifasr-llm-provider.mjs
